modal.title: Invite by email
modal.no_permissions: Please select at least one permission.
modal.subtitle: Send an email invitation to give someone access.
modal.servers_hint: Pick the servers to invite this user to — the same permissions apply to each, in a single email.
modal.servers_hint_invite: This server is always included — pick any additional servers. The same permissions apply to each.
modal.no_other_servers: No other servers with the same egg available.

copy.title: Copy access to other servers
copy.subtitle: Invite this user to other servers with the same permissions. They receive a single email.

page.title: Users & Invitations
page.subtitle: Manage who has access to this server
page.empty_hint: Invite someone by email to give them access to this server.
page.confirm_remove: Remove this user from the server?

accept.title: Server invitation
accept.wrong_email: You are logged in as {{current}}, but this invitation is for {{expected}}.
accept.login_hint: Log in with your existing account, then accept the invitation.
accept.name: Name
accept.expired: This invitation has expired or has been revoked.
accept.already_accepted: This invitation has already been accepted.
